# Agency Agents Space

Independent hosted AI specialist team planner for the open-source agency-agents roster, NEXUS workflows, and paid planning exports.

Canonical site: https://agency-agents.space/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Last updated: 2026-06-30

## Important Boundary

This site is not the official Agency Agents app and does not install agents directly. It prepares roster plans, handoff templates, evidence gates, and paid exports.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://agency-agents.space/
- Planner preview: https://agency-agents.space/planner/
- NEXUS sprint planner: https://agency-agents.space/nexus-sprint/
- Codex agents planning: https://agency-agents.space/codex-agents/
- Integrations: https://agency-agents.space/integrations/
- Pricing: https://agency-agents.space/pricing/
- Source notes: https://agency-agents.space/source-notes/
- FAQ: https://agency-agents.space/faq/

## Source Facts

- Upstream repository: msitarzewski/agency-agents on GitHub
- Code license observed: MIT
- Latest cloned commit: 48502e16e3a358bbf598a35d49b2b46e698a518d
- GitHub stars observed: 120374
- Agent markdown files observed: 233
- Supported tool routes observed: 14

## Planner API

- POST /api/planner returns a sample preview and 402 payment-required state until paid access is verified.
- GET /api/runtime returns pricing, payment configuration, and one-time payment terms.
- POST /api/checkout starts configured Polar hosted checkout or returns an explicit not-configured blocker.
